title: World Cup 2026: Kylian Mbappe condemns racist posts from Paraguayan senator Celeste Amarilla
description: France forward Kylian Mbappe condemns a Paraguayan senator as "despicable" and unworthy of her position after she made a number of racist remarks mocking his origin and education.
content:
France forward Kylian Mbappe has condemned a Paraguayan senator as "despicable" and unworthy of her position after she made a number of racist remarks mocking his origin and education.

title: EasyJet shares jump almost 10% after it agrees £5.5bn takeover bid
description: Airline’s board to recommend offer of £6.90 a share in deal analysts say shows UK firms are being bought on the cheap
content:
Shares in easyJet surged nearly 10% after the airline agreed to a £5.5bn takeover at the fifth attempt, but analysts said that it showed UK firms were being bought on the cheap.
The low-cost carrier’s board will recommend shareholders accept an offer... [2694 chars]

title: Consultants in England vote in favour of NHS strikes
description: The senior doctors in England now have a mandate for strike action over the next 12 months.
content:
In a ballot, 76% of the senior doctors who are members of the British Medical Association (BMA) said they would be willing to take industrial action, meaning they now have a mandate for strike action over the next 12 months.

title: Fraudster George Cottrell seen at numerous Reform events despite ‘no formal role’ in party
description: Nigel Farage urged to clarify ‘dependence’ on Cottrell, who also joined Reform leader in Abu Dhabi in December
content:
Nigel Farage has been accompanied by his friend George Cottrell, a convicted fraudster, to numerous Reform events and fundraisers and on a trip to Abu Dhabi, raising questions about the claim that he has no official role in the party.

title: Jeremy Hansen, Artemis II astronaut, is leaving the Canadian Space Agency
description: Astronaut Jeremy Hansen, who made a historic trip around the moon in April as part of the Artemis II space mission, is leaving the Canadian Space Agency.
content:
Astronaut Jeremy Hansen, the first Canadian to take part in a lunar mission, is retiring from the Canadian Space Agency (CSA).
Hansen made a historic trip around the moon in April as part of the Artemis II space mission.
